Our Services

Every Detail. Done Right.

From a quick exterior refresh to a full ceramic coating — we bring the detailing studio to your driveway.

💧
Exterior Detail

Hand wash, clay bar treatment, tire shine, window cleaning, and a full exterior polish for a head-turning finish.

Learn More →
🪑
Interior Detail

Deep vacuum, steam cleaning, leather conditioning, carpet shampoo, and odor elimination — spotless inside out.

Learn More →
🏆
Full Detail Package

Our most popular service — complete interior and exterior detailing for the ultimate clean from bumper to bumper.

Learn More →
🔬
Ceramic Coating

Long-lasting nano-ceramic protection that repels water, resists UV, and keeps your paint looking new for years.

Learn More →
✨
Paint Correction

Multi-stage machine polishing to eliminate swirl marks, light scratches, and oxidation — restoring factory gloss.

Learn More →
⚙️
Engine Bay Detail

Professional degreasing, rinse, and dressing of your engine compartment — so under the hood is as clean as the cabin.

Learn More →
How It Works

Three Steps to a Showroom Finish

Simple, fast, and completely hassle-free — we built the process around your schedule, not ours.

01
📅
Book Online

Pick your service, tell us your location, and lock in a time — takes 60 seconds. No phone tag, no waiting on hold.

02
🚐
We Come To You

Our team arrives fully equipped at your home or office. You don't lift a finger — we bring everything we need.

03
🏎️
Drive Away Shining

Inspect your vehicle, approve the result, and drive away with a car that turns heads. Satisfaction guaranteed.

Why Choose Glass

We Do It Better.
Every Single Time.

We're not a franchise or a factory line. Glass Mobile Detailing is an owner-operated business built on attention to detail and a guarantee that you'll love the result.

✓
Owner On Every Job
The owner shows up personally — you're not getting handed off to an untrained sub.
✓
100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
Not happy? We come back and make it right. No questions asked.
✓
Premium Products Only
We use professional-grade chemicals and tools — nothing from the auto parts store shelf.
✓
Fully Insured
Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind — your vehicle is always protected.
✓
Serving All of Scottsdale
North Scottsdale, Old Town, Arcadia, Paradise Valley — we come to you, wherever you are.
